ie.updateNote: The Department of Foreign Affairs strongly advises against all travel to South Sudan, including the capital Juba. If you have no pressing need to remain, we recommend that you leave if it is safe to do so. Irish nationals choosing to stay in South Sudan should remain alert to the local security situation, monitor the media and stay in a safe location. Citizens who are outside Juba, should exercise
